PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Sheila Robello appearing via zoom for Shu Qing Gee (Petitioner).

Mrs. Robello stated she had no objections. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Lost Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated May 18, 2019 is admitted to probate. Shu Qing Gee is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 24, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-06-2023 Continued To Jun-14-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Apr-19-2023 Continued To May-23-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-05-2023 Continued To Apr-19-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances; Sheila Robello appearing via zoom for Shu Qing Gee.

Mrs. Robello stated that she is personally appearing today, that former counsel was suspended, and she is coming in on the matter and working on getting substitution on file. The Court asked what efforts have been made to locate heirs. Mrs. Robello stated that the executor is the surviving spouse, and she is representing the only heir of the estate, that decedent had one brother who pre-deceased him, and that she does not believe the brother had any children, and that she will need to check on it. The Court stated that it would like to get more clarification as to what has been done to contact heirs. The Petition for Probate of lost will and testamentary is continued to April 19, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt. Deputy: H. Singh. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Continued To Dec-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Kutrubes, via Zoom, for Shu Q. Gee, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports on the issues causing the delay in addressing the Examiner's notes. Counsel requests that the court extend the Letters of Special Administration. The court replies that it is not inclined to extend the Letters for counsel's lack of diligence with this matter. The court acknowledges the documents pending in the court's e-filing queue and advises counsel that it is difficult to review documents unless they are filed at least one week prior to the hearing. There is discussion regarding a statute of limitations in a related matter and counsel advises that he is working with Nevada counsel to determine the specifics of the preceding. There is discussion of confirming the lost will. The court advises counsel that it needs additional information in writing regarding what exactly happened to the original will. There is discussion regarding whether the court will require a copy of the trust to be filed with counsel asking if it can be filed under seal. Counsel is advised that if the court requires him to file a copy of the trust and he wishes to file it under seal, he will need to file a motion for an order to do so, however, counsel is advised that motions to file sealed documents in the probate court are rarely granted.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Dec-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. The court notes that this matter has been continued multiple times for failure to file all required documents to meet statutory requirements, and for failure to address the issues raised by the assigned Examiner. Therefore, the Petition for Probate of Will is taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2021 Continued To Aug-25-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Lin, via CourtCall, for Shu Gee, Petitioner.

At the outset, counsel reports that he has submitted documents to the court for filing and should be in the court's e-filing queue. The court instructs counsel to monitor the court's register of actions to confirm the filing of his papers in order to advance this matter.

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 25, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Balmy. Not reported.
